query: Notre-Dame de Paris Emmanuel Marie bells July 2025 first flight test official press release

reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it directly contains the crucial July 2025 facts matching the query: 'On July 17, Emmanuel and Marie made their sounds heard ... for their first flight,' and that this first flight 'allowed them to demonstrate their proper functioning and to make final adjustments.' By contrast, A mostly surfaces unrelated 2024 reopening/test articles and only one partially relevant result; its strongest snippets are about different bells/events, making an LLM more likely to answer incorrectly or mix up the 2024 reopening bell tests with the July 2025 first flight of Emmanuel and Marie.
